summary.diagnosis:
*Jul 6→Jul 12 vs Jun 29→Jul 5* · Revenue -19% (1,029,756 vs 1,268,737 EGP) · Spend -15% · ROAS 5.55 (-5%).
   • CPC: 2.48 → 2.16 EGP (-13%, down (good))
   • CVR: 1.29% → 1.05% (-19%, down (drag))
   • AOV: 1,128 → 1,135 EGP (+1%, ~flat)
   *Who moved it:* *CVR 59%* of the move (hurt, -234,479 EGP)  ·  *CPC 39%* of the move (helped, +27,545 EGP)  ·  *AOV 2%* of the move (helped, +6,349 EGP).
   *Read:* *CVR* fell -19%, the biggest of the three.
     Worth about *-234,479 EGP of revenue at the same clicks*.
     That drove ROAS -5%.
     Revenue -19% because spend -15%.
   *Deeper:* biggest single mover was *BBG PJS lebleb*, its CVR went 5.26%→0.95% on 4,078 EGP spend (~35% of the swing).

summary.diagnosis:
*Jul 6→Jul 12 vs Jun 29→Jul 5* · Revenue +149% (130,241 vs 52,248 EGP) · Spend +117% · ROAS 3.93 (+15%).
   • CPC: 7.93 → 9.8 EGP (+24%, up (drag))
   • CVR: 2.03% → 2.01% (-1%, ~flat)
   • AOV: 1,340 → 1,915 EGP (+43%, up (good))
   *Who moved it:* *AOV 62%* of the move (helped, +39,100 EGP)  ·  *CPC 37%* of the move (hurt, -6,317 EGP)  ·  *CVR 2%* of the move (hurt, -1,294 EGP).
   *Read:* *AOV* rose +43%, the biggest of the three.
     Worth about *39,100 EGP of revenue*.
     That drove ROAS +15%.
     Revenue +149% because spend +117%.
   *Deeper:* biggest single mover was <https://business.facebook.com/adsmanager/manage/ads?act=336343742536460&selected_ad_ids=120254866213390011|Soft pants   05-12>, its AOV went 1000.83 EGP→1880.0 EGP on 3,119 EGP spend (~13% of the swing).
